mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, order_no, create_by, create_time, status, audit_by, audit_time, inventory_type, inventory_dept_id, inventory_dept_name, inventory_category68_id, inventory_category68_code, storage_place, plan_date, finish_time, total_count, checked_count, remark, del_flag, del_by, del_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_inventory
mapper.select: where customer_id = #{customerId} and order_no = #{orderNo} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) limit 1

select ifnull(max(cast(substring(order_no, length(#{datePrefix}) + 1) as unsigned)), 0) from sb_asset_inventory where customer_id = #{customerId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and order_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and length(order_no) = length(#{datePrefix}) + 4
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_inventory (id, customer_id, order_no, create_by, create_time, status, inventory_type, inventory_dept_id, inventory_dept_name, inventory_category68_id, inventory_category68_code, storage_place, plan_date, total_count, checked_count, remark, del_flag, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{orderNo}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{status}, #{inventoryType}, #{inventoryDeptId}, #{inventoryDeptName}, #{inventoryCategory68Id}, #{inventoryCategory68Code}, #{storagePlace}, #{planDate}, #{totalCount}, #{checkedCount}, #{remark}, 0, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_inventory set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
